name: repo-doctor-skills
description: A bilingual, cross-platform AI Skills framework for repository diagnosis, code review, document review, and safe agent workflows.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:schema && npm run validate:skills && npm run workflow:validate
scripts.test:workflow: node scripts/test-repo-doctor-workflows.mjs && node scripts/test-workflow-registry.mjs && node scripts/test-golden-workflows.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:ci && npm run test:activation && npm run test:workflow && npm run test:maintainer && npm run test:build-integrity && npm run test:plugin-sync && npm run test:docs && npm run test:release && npm run test:eval && npm run test:doctor
scripts.build: node scripts/build-skills.mjs && node scripts/sync-productivity-toolkit-plugin.mjs && node scripts/sync-skill-maintainer-plugin.mjs && node scripts/build-chatgpt-skills.mjs
